text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
I'm visiting a shrine on the first day of the new
year to renew my resolve to support Narita
Taishin when...

text_block_list.name: Winning Ticket
text_block_list.text: Ohhh! Taishin, look! It's your trainer! Hiiiii!

text_block_list.name: Narita Taishin
text_block_list.text: Great...
choice_data_list: Taishin! I didn't know you'd be here.
Taishin! I didn't know you'd be here.

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
She hates crowds, so I wasn't expecting to bump
into her at a shrine crowded with people making
their first visit of the year.

text_block_list.name: Narita Taishin
text_block_list.text:
It's not like I wanted to come, but these two kept
bugging me about it.

text_block_list.name: Winning Ticket
text_block_list.text: Now that we're finally senior racers, we couldn't just not come!

text_block_list.name: Winning Ticket
text_block_list.text:
The Umamusume who debuted after us keep
getting stronger, but we're gonna get stronger
too!

text_block_list.name: Winning Ticket
text_block_list.text:
And to do that, we gotta get fired up from the
very beginning of the year! Wooooo!

text_block_list.name: Biwa Hayahide
text_block_list.text:
I feel as though you're always fired up—but I do
agree with you for the most part.

text_block_list.name: Biwa Hayahide
text_block_list.text:
Let's go, Taishin. I still have to pray for your good
health.

text_block_list.name: Narita Taishin
text_block_list.text: ...No one asked you to.

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
They chat more freely than when the Kikuka Sho
was looming over them. Watching the three
interact makes me smile.

text_block_list.name: Biwa Hayahide
text_block_list.text:
Now that we're done here—hm? Taishin, are you
okay?

text_block_list.name: Narita Taishin
text_block_list.text:
I'm out. I can't stand being here anymore. I'm
going home.

text_block_list.name: Winning Ticket
text_block_list.text:
Whaaat?! But we don't get to hang out that often!
C'mon, stay with us a little longer!

text_block_list.name: Winning Ticket
text_block_list.text: Quick! You gotta help us change her mind!

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
She's dragging me into it! Still, Taishin really does
look like she's in bad shape, so it might be good
to go elsewhere.
choice_data_list: I'll treat you to something tasty.
Why not go for a run?
How about we go to an arcade?

text_block_list.name: Narita Taishin
text_block_list.text: Like...

text_block_list.name: Narita Taishin
text_block_list.text:
What in the actual hell are we doing here?! Is this
the kinda cafe you're into?!

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
It's just, this was the only place that didn't have a
line out the door!

text_block_list.name: Bear-eared Maid
text_block_list.text:
Grrr, welcome! ♪ Just give me a roar when you're
rawr-dy to order! ♪

text_block_list.name: Biwa Hayahide
text_block_list.text: Rawr-ger that... I think?

text_block_list.name: Biwa Hayahide
text_block_list.text: What kind of rules do they have here?!

text_block_list.name: Winning Ticket
text_block_list.text:
Ahahaha! This cafe's so fun! Okay, I know what I
want!

text_block_list.name: Winning Ticket
text_block_list.text:
Rawr! Excuse meee! I'd like a Bear-y Berry
Pancake Plate, please!

text_block_list.name: Bear-eared Maid
text_block_list.text: Grrr-eat choice! ♪ And what would you like?

text_block_list.name: Narita Taishin
text_block_list.text: Er... I'll just have a hot tea with lemon...

text_block_list.name: Bear-eared Maid
text_block_list.text: Hm? Sorry, I can bear-ly hear you.

text_block_list.name: Narita Taishin
text_block_list.text: Ugh...

text_block_list.name: Narita Taishin
text_block_list.text: I-I'd like the Brewin' Bruin Lemon Tea.

text_block_list.name: Bear-eared Maid
text_block_list.text: Got it, rawr! ♪

text_block_list.name: Narita Taishin
text_block_list.text: Nnngh!

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
"...then I'm kicking that doofus to the other side
of the world!"
Narita Taishin's words from before her debut ring
in my head...

text_block_list.name: Narita Taishin
text_block_list.text: Are you serious?

text_block_list.name: Biwa Hayahide
text_block_list.text:
Haha! On New Year's Day? I admire your
enthusiasm!

text_block_list.name: Biwa Hayahide
text_block_list.text:
Then again, that's a very fitting activity for us to
do.

text_block_list.name: Biwa Hayahide
text_block_list.text:
We might as well. Let's run until we find
somewhere we can take a quiet break.

text_block_list.name: Winning Ticket
text_block_list.text:
Whoooaaa! It's the first sunrise of the new
yeaaaar!

text_block_list.name: Narita Taishin
text_block_list.text:
Yeah, if we'd been here hours ago. It's practically
noon already.

text_block_list.name: Winning Ticket
text_block_list.text:
But this place still feels great! I had no idea it
existed!

text_block_list.name: Biwa Hayahide
text_block_list.text:
The view truly is fantastic. Do you come here
often, Taishin?

text_block_list.name: Narita Taishin
text_block_list.text: Yeah, I guess.

text_block_list.name: Winning Ticket
text_block_list.text:
Ohhh! I can see the racecourse! Taishin,
Hayahide! Over here!

text_block_list.name: Narita Taishin
text_block_list.text:
(I'm pretty sure this is the first time it's been so
noisy here.)

text_block_list.name: Winning Ticket
text_block_list.text: Oooh! That's an awesome idea! Hey, hey, hey! You like arcades, right, Taishin?!

text_block_list.name: Narita Taishin
text_block_list.text:
No... I like playing games to kill time, but I don't
really go to arcades.

text_block_list.name: Winning Ticket
text_block_list.text: But Taishiiiiin...

text_block_list.name: Narita Taishin
text_block_list.text: Ugh, fine.

text_block_list.name: Winning Ticket
text_block_list.text: Really? Yaaaay!

text_block_list.name: Biwa Hayahide
text_block_list.text: You're rather indulgent today.

text_block_list.name: Narita Taishin
text_block_list.text: Shut up!

text_block_list.name: Winning Ticket
text_block_list.text:
Yaaaaah! I won't let a single one of you escape
my wrath!

text_block_list.name: Narita Taishin
text_block_list.text:
Bonehead! Don't use your shotgun on the
weaklings! You need to save it for the big one
coming after this—

text_block_list.name: Winning Ticket
text_block_list.text:
Gaaah! What do I do, what do I do?! It's biting
me—I don't wanna become a zombiiie!

text_block_list.name: Narita Taishin
text_block_list.text:
Ugh... Shoot them in the head to kill them
instantly!

text_block_list.name: Winning Ticket
text_block_list.text:
Whoa! Wow, Taishin... You're nailing every one of
'em with headshots!

text_block_list.name: Biwa Hayahide
text_block_list.text: It's nice seeing them having fun.
